ideation: This animation sequence will depict a badger digging, using its forepaws.  Since our robot doesn't have paws, we will simulate the digging motion using the arms. The animation will focus on a repetitive digging motion, with the arms moving downward and then upward, mimicking the action of digging into the ground. The overall pose should evoke the determined and focused nature of a badger at work.  The right arm will be the primary actor in this animation. The left arm will remain relatively still to provide a sense of balance and contrast.  We'll use small variations in the joint angles and wrist positions to give the movement a more natural feel.

frames.beat: both arms rest, ready to dig
the right arm powerfully thrusts down into the earth
the right arm pulls back up, dirt flying
right arm digs again with determined force
